announcements.title: Welcome to MFX Mod
announcements.summary: Announcements are live. Edit this file on GitHub to push updates instantly.
announcements.body:
This feed is loaded from GitHub when players tap Announcements in the mod menu.

To publish a new note, edit announcements.json in your repo and commit. Every player sees it on their next open — no APK rebuild required.

announcements.title: New Season Cards Live
announcements.summary: 'Rising Stars' edition now available in Ultra Elite packs.
announcements.body:
'Rising Stars' features 20 brand-new players with dynamic ratings based on real-world performance milestones.

Cards are now obtainable with significantly boosted odds through limited-time Ultra Elite Packs.
